reliabilityChanges: Duplicate-ID backup restore repairs a missing current transcript archive while preserving a valid current transcript.
Complete-transcript exports deterministically restore and persist a missing summary before generating transcript, Markdown, or PDF content.

ios.knownHostGate: Xcode 26.3 cannot mount the developer disk image for the paired iOS 26.5.2 iPhone.

qualificationBoundary: Build and fault-injection evidence does not prove locked 60/120-minute recording, physical native playback/import recovery, real saved-audio transcription, restored-backup behavior on device, interruption recovery, or destination-app Markdown/PDF receipt.
